title: Rasper
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Rasper |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|It was a droid that sent Rasper on his way.''"
"''A lucky droid, a luckier shot.|[[Boiny]] and a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]|''[[Cloak of Deception]]''}} '''Rasper''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who presumably worked with [[Arwen Cohl]]'s team in the [[Nebula Front/Legends|Nebula Front]]. He was shot and killed by a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] prior to the [[Dorvalla Incident|incident at Dorvalla]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rasper }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]]
